description: A graphic on a pale background with a faint seal watermark. Large dark blue text reads 'Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law.' Below are images of a specimen permanent-resident card and a specimen immigrant visa, both overprinted with a large red 'REVOKED' stamp.
notable_text: Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law.; PERMANENT RESIDENT; REVOKED
